app.title: Screen Time Limiter: Custom Application Blocker & Focus Timer
siteAccess.title: Limited site access detected
siteAccess.body: Chrome is currently restricting this extension's access to web pages. Screen Time Limiter: Custom Website Blocker & Focus Timer needs access to all sites in order to block them.
siteAccess.grantFailed: Chrome rejected the access request. You can change site access in chrome://extensions.
language.label: Language
manual.title: Instruction Manual
manual.error: Could not load the instruction manual.
manual.mtBanner: This manual is machine-translated. Phrasing may be rough; the English version is the source of truth.
settings.title: Global Settings
settings.copy: These preferences apply across all block groups.
settings.autosaveDebounceHelp: How long the popup waits after the last keystroke before persisting your edits.
settings.debugModeHelp: When on, emits verbose [CustomBlocker] / [CustomBlocker:trace] console output. Your own helpers.log() calls always work regardless.
settings.defaultSnoozeMinutesHelp: Snooze length used when creating new non-custom groups.
connection.title: Web-app bridge
connection.copy: Connect this app to the macOS app so Default and Custom groups can be linked and kept in sync.
connection.serverToggleHelp: Other apps on this Mac can connect to this hub over a fixed local address.
connection.clientHelp: Connect this browser to the macOS app over the fixed local address.
connectionGroup.title: Web-app bridge
connectionGroup.copy: Link this group with a same-named group on another connected program. Linked groups form one shared cluster.
connectionGroup.offline: Connect the web-app bridge in Settings first.
connectionGroup.frozen: Unfreeze this group before connecting it.
connectionGroup.ready: Pick a program, then connect the group with the same name on that side.
connectionGroup.mirrorApps: Blocked applications (managed on the linked app)
connectionGroup.mirrorSites: Blocked websites (managed on the linked app)
connectionGroup.mirrorAppsHint: Blocked apps are edited on the linked Mac app. Shown here read-only.
connectionGroup.mirrorSitesHint: Blocked websites are edited in the linked browser. Shown here read-only.
connectionGroup.clusterOffline: A linked program is offline. Shared changes will sync when it reconnects.
connectionGroup.warnMemberOffline: A linked program is offline — open it to keep linked groups in sync.
settings.localFolderCopy: Custom rules can read and write .txt, .csv, and .json files inside the app's managed local folder. Paths stay inside this folder.
settings.localFolderStatusManaged: Connected — using the app's managed folder (Application Support › MacBlocker › LocalFiles).
settings.localFolderStatusNeedsPermissio: Folder selected ({name}), but Chrome requires permission again. Choose the folder again to re-authorize.
settings.localFolderUnsupported: This Chrome build does not expose the File System Access API here.
settings.deviceControlCopyGranted: Accessibility permission is granted, so app blocking can run.
settings.deviceControlCopyMissing: App blocking needs Accessibility permission. Grant it so blocking can run.
settings.deviceControlStatusGranted: Accessibility permission granted. App blocking is active.
settings.deviceControlStatusMissing: Accessibility permission missing. App blocking cannot run.
permission.title: Enable necessary control
permission.message: Grant Accessibility permission so the app can enforce app blocking. Without it, blocking cannot run.
groups.title: Block Groups
groups.copy: Drag groups to reorder them. Each group has its own rules and toggle.
groups.deleteAllDisabled: Clear is disabled while a strict freeze is still locked.
groups.deleteAllConfirm: Clear all groups? This cannot be undone.
groups.deleteAllConfirmFrozen: Clear all groups? Some groups are frozen and this cannot be undone.
editor.title: Edit Group
editor.copy: Add the applications you want this group to block.
editor.exportGroupPromptCopied: The block-group string was copied to your clipboard. You can also copy it from here.
editor.importGroupPrompt: Paste a block-group string to import.
editor.typeSummaryYouTube: Type: YouTube and video block group. Creator filters apply on YouTube, and short-vs-long video matching also works on supported video sites.
editor.typeSummaryTikTok: Type: TikTok block group. Filter by content type and author when available.
editor.typeSummaryFacebook: Type: Facebook block group. Filter by content type and author when available.
editor.typeSummaryInstagram: Type: Instagram block group. Filter by content type and author when available.
editor.typeSummaryTwitch: Type: Twitch block group. Filter by content type and author when available.
editor.typeSummaryReddit: Type: Reddit block group. Leave the subreddit list empty to apply to all Reddit, or target only specific subreddits.
editor.typeSummaryDiscord: Type: Discord block group. Filter by server when available.
editor.typeSummaryTwitter: Type: Twitter / X block group. Leave the account list empty to apply to all of Twitter / X, or target only specific accounts.
editor.typeSummaryCustom: Type: Custom rules group. Your JavaScript function decides which domains should be blocked.
mode.afterMinutes: Block after a number of minutes
timed.summaryTimer: {time} used so far. Resets every {hours} hour{suffix}.
platform.copy: Choose whether this group applies to all {platform}, only {shortLabel}, only {longLabel}, only {postLabel}, certain authors, or a combination.
platform.copy.twitter: Choose whether this group applies to all of {platform}, or only to certain accounts.
platform.help.twitter: Account filtering applies on {platform}. Add one @handle (or profile link) per line; leave the list empty to apply to all of {platform}.
platform.authorModeExclude: Apply to all except certain authors
platform.help.youtube: Author filtering applies on {platform}. The short-vs-long selector also works on supported video sites when their page type can be identified.
platform.help.generic: Author filtering applies when author identifiers can be detected. Content types map to {shortLabel}, {longLabel}, and {postLabel} when those page forms are detectable.
surfaceHide.title: Hide elements
surfaceHide.help: Hide specific buttons or content surfaces on this platform, independent of blocking.
surfaceHide.youtube.shorts: Hide the Shorts button and shelves
surfaceHide.facebook.reels: Hide the Reels link and shelves
reddit.title: Reddit Filters
reddit.copy: Apply this group to all of Reddit, only certain subreddits, or all subreddits except certain ones.
reddit.modeExclude: Apply to all except certain subreddits
reddit.help: Use one subreddit per line. Plain names like `productivity` and paths like `r/productivity` are both accepted.
discord.title: Discord Filters
discord.copy: Apply this group to all of Discord, or to a custom mix of servers and channels — entries can be either, in any combination.
discord.modeExclude: Apply to all except certain servers/channels
discord.targetsHelp: One Discord server ID or channel ID per line. Both kinds may be mixed in the same list. Plain snowflake IDs and links of the form discord.com/channels/<serverId> or discord.com/channels/<serverId>/<channelId> are accepted; channel links keep the channel ID as the entry. A page matches if its server OR its channel appears in the list.
status.allowlistWarning: Allow-list mode often leaves the feed empty or full of ads. The platform may still recommend other content.
status.redditAllowlistWarning: Allow-list mode hides every subreddit you didn't list. Reddit's home feed may still surface ads or unlisted communities.
status.discordAllowlistWarning: Allow-list mode blocks every server and channel you did not list. Direct messages and @me pages are not server- or channel-specific and may stay accessible.
custom.title: Blocking Rules
custom.editorCopy: Custom rules are event-driven. The script registers handlers that run across tabs and navigations until you click Run again, disable the group, or delete it.
custom.aiPromptPlaceholder: Describe what you want this custom rule to do...
custom.aiPromptHelp: This copies a bundled prompt with your request, the current rule, and the custom-rule API reference. Paste it into your AI tool, then paste the generated code back here.
custom.aiPromptCopyFailed: Could not copy the AI prompt.
custom.runReloadReminder: reload any already-open page to apply the rule there.
custom.templatesCopy: Pick a preset, tweak its parameters, then apply it to replace the current rule.
custom.templatesError: Could not load the template browser.
custom.templatesNoMatches: No templates match the current filter.
custom.confirmReplaceTemplate: Replace the current custom rule with this preset?
schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.copy: Limit this group to certain days or time windows.
schedule.help: Leave blank to apply all day. Use one range per line in HHMM-HHMM format.
freeze.title: Freeze
snooze.title: Snooze
snooze.customCopy: Custom rules don't snooze. Pressing the button fires a snoozePress event so rules can react (e.g. log, redirect, fire other events), but there's no programmatic snooze API.
snooze.summary.disabled: Snooze is disabled for this group.
snooze.summary.disabledFrozen: This frozen group has snooze disabled, so it cannot be snoozed.
snooze.summary.frozen: This group is frozen, so the snooze timing settings are locked. Each confirmation still requires waiting 5 seconds.
snooze.summary.normal: Temporarily disable this group by choosing snooze minutes, an activation delay, a cooldown, and a confirmation count. Each confirmation requires waiting 5 seconds.
snooze.summary.pending: Snooze starts in {delay}, then runs for {time}.
snooze.summary.cooldown: Snooze ended. The rule is back, and snooze is cooling down for {time}.
snooze.warning.invalidMinutes: Snooze minutes must be a number greater than 0.
snooze.warning.disabled: Snooze is disabled for this group.
snooze.warning.disabledFrozen: Snooze was disabled before this group was frozen, so it cannot be snoozed now.
snooze.warning.invalidActivationDelay: Activation delay must be a number greater than or equal to 0.
snooze.warning.invalidCooldown: Cooldown must be a number between 0 and {max} minutes.
snooze.warning.invalidConfirmations: Times of confirmation must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.
snooze.warning.pending: A snooze is already scheduled. It starts in {time}.
snooze.warning.active: This group is already snoozed for {time} more.
snooze.warning.cooldown: Snooze is cooling down for {time} more.
snooze.confirmationMessage: This snooze requires {count} confirmation step(s). You must wait {seconds} seconds between each step.
sites.label: Blocked applications
apps.label: Blocked applications
apps.help: Add the applications you want this group to block. Click the plus tile to search your installed apps.
apps.pickerCopy: Search your installed applications and choose one to block.
hint.copy: Enabled groups use the browser's native extension-blocked behavior, similar to ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT.
modal.unfreezeMessageDefault: Are you sure you want to give up your self-discipline?
unfreeze.message.1: Are you sure you want to give up your self-discipline?
unfreeze.message.2: One deep breath. Are you really choosing distraction right now?
unfreeze.message.3: Future you is watching. Still want to weaken this rule?
unfreeze.message.4: That urge will pass. Are you certain you want to open this door?
unfreeze.message.5: Discipline is expensive to build and cheap to lose. Continue?
unfreeze.message.6: You made this guardrail for a reason. Do you want to lower it?
unfreeze.message.7: This is your focused self asking for one more pause. Continue?
unfreeze.message.8: Temptation sounds reasonable for a minute. Are you still sure?
unfreeze.message.9: If you confirm, your willpower has to work harder later. Continue?
unfreeze.message.10: This click is not neutral. Do you still want to give in?
unfreeze.message.11: Imagine how you will feel in ten minutes. Still unfreeze?
unfreeze.message.12: You are very close to talking yourself out of discipline. Continue?
unfreeze.message.13: Your boundary is holding. Do you want to be the one who breaks it?
unfreeze.message.14: This is a tiny rebellion against your own goals. Continue?
unfreeze.message.15: You built a system because motivation is unreliable. Still proceed?
unfreeze.message.16: The shortcut is glowing. Are you certain it is worth it?
unfreeze.message.17: Pause again. Do you want comfort now more than progress later?
unfreeze.message.18: This is the part where discipline usually wins. Are you opting out?
unfreeze.message.19: Almost there. Last chance to keep your promise to yourself.
unfreeze.message.20: Final check: are you absolutely sure you want to give up your self-discipline?
empty.noGroups: No block groups yet. Add your first group to begin.
filter.blockHomePageRedditHelp: Blocks the Reddit home feed, r/popular, and r/all.
filter.blockHomePageDiscordHelp: Blocks the Discord DMs home screen (/channels/@me).
filter.skipToNextOnBlock: Skip to next video when blocked
filter.skipToNextOnBlockHelp: For scroll-based feeds (Shorts, TikTok, Reels), skip to the next video instead of redirecting.
filter.fallbackUrlHelp: When blocked, redirect to this URL. Leave empty for default behavior (about:blank).
freeze.summary.notFrozen: Freeze this group to stop future edits.
freeze.bridgeOffline: Freeze can't be changed while a linked program is offline.
freeze.summary.strictReady: Strict frozen. You can start the unfreeze ritual now.
freeze.summary.ready: Frozen. You can start the unfreeze ritual now.
freeze.summary.parental: Parental frozen. A guardian password is required to unfreeze.
freeze.pin.freezePrompt: Enter the 6-digit guardian password to freeze this group.
freeze.pin.unfreezePrompt: Enter the 6-digit guardian password to unfreeze this group.
freeze.settings.title: Guardian password
freeze.settings.setPrompt: Set a 6-digit password. You'll need it to freeze or unfreeze this group.
freeze.settings.managePrompt: Enter the current password to verify or clear it.
status.snoozeScheduled: Scheduled snooze for "{name}". It starts in {delay}.
status.strictLocked: This strict-frozen group is still locked.
status.invalidName: Please give this block group a name.
status.duplicateName: Another group already uses that name. Pick a unique name.
status.invalidAllowedMinutes: Allowed minutes must be a number greater than 0.
status.invalidSnoozeActivationDelay: Activation delay must be a number greater than or equal to 0.
status.invalidSnoozeCooldown: Cooldown must be a number between 0 and {max} minutes.
status.invalidSnoozeConfirmations: Times of confirmation must be an integer greater than or equal to 0.
status.invalidResetHours: Timer reset interval must be greater than 0 hours.
status.invalidSnoozeMinutes: Snooze minutes must be a number greater than 0.
status.errorRunCustomGroup: Could not (re)load custom-group handlers. Check the rule for syntax / runtime errors.
status.customRunHaltedTimeBudget: Run halted: rule exceeded the time budget.
status.customSyntaxHaltedTimeBudget: Syntax check halted: rule exceeded the time budget.
status.strictFreezeHours: Strict freeze hours must be greater than 0 and no more than {max}.
status.bulkDeleteStrictLocked: Clear is disabled while a strict freeze is still locked.
status.errorReorderGroups: Could not reorder your block groups.
status.errorSaveGroup: Could not save this block group.
status.errorCreateGroup: Could not create a new block group.
status.errorDeleteGroup: Could not delete this block group.
status.errorFreezeGroup: Could not freeze this block group.
status.invalidImportGroup: That clipboard text is not a valid block-group string.
status.errorUnfreezeGroup: Could not unfreeze this block group.
status.errorLoadGroups: Could not load your saved block groups.
status.errorExportGroup: Could not export this block group.
status.errorImportGroup: Could not import a block group from the clipboard.
logFeed.title: Log
logFeed.hint: Output from helpers.log() / helpers.warn() / helpers.error() inside your custom rules.
logFeed.empty: Nothing logged yet. Call helpers.log("hello") inside one of your handlers to see entries here.
